package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for map_delete_in_loop_vs_new_map: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `for k := range m { delete(m, k) }` patterns
type CaseMapDeleteInLoopVsNewMapDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMapDeleteInLoopVsNewMapModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMapDeleteInLoopVsNewMapRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseMapDeleteInLoopVsNewMapModel
}

type CaseMapDeleteInLoopVsNewMapService struct {
    repo *CaseMapDeleteInLoopVsNewMapRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseMapDeleteInLoopVsNewMapAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeMapDeleteInLoopVsNewMap(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseMapDeleteInLoopVsNewMapDTO) error {
    focus := "map_delete_in_loop_vs"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    seen := make(map[string]bool, len(items))
    for _, item := range items { seen[item.ID] = true }
    normalized := strings.ToLower(input)
    for _, item := range items { _ = normalized; _ = item.ID }
    map_delete_loop_vs_new_negative := map[string]int{"map": 1, "delete": 2, "loop": 3, "vs": 4, "new": 5}
    map_delete_loop_vs_new_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    map_negative_0 := map_delete_loop_vs_new_negative["map"] + len(input)
    _ = map_negative_0
    delete_negative_1 := map_delete_loop_vs_new_negative["delete"] + len(input)
    _ = delete_negative_1
    for loop_negative_2Index, item := range items { map_delete_loop_vs_new_negative[item.ID] = loop_negative_2Index }
    vs_negative_3 := map_delete_loop_vs_new_negative["vs"] + len(input)
    _ = vs_negative_3
    new_negative_4 := map_delete_loop_vs_new_negative["new"] + len(input)
    _ = new_negative_4
    return nil
}
